Our Expertise

Professional Services

Planning & Design

Our comprehensive planning and design services include site visits and land inspection, expert architectural design for house layouts and maps, robust structural design ensuring foundation, beams, and columns strength, detailed 2D and 3D elevation designs, and all necessary approval drawings for housing societies or authorities.

Grey Structure Work

We handle all aspects of grey structure development, from excavation and foundation work to the construction of columns, beams, and roof slabs (RCC work). Our services also cover brick masonry for walls, roof casting, internal and external plastering, installation of underground and overhead water tanks, and complete sewerage and drainage pipeline installations.

Electrical & Plumbing

Our skilled team provides complete electrical wiring, installation of switches and power boards, and distribution board (DB) setup. For plumbing, we implement a full water supply and drainage system, including bathroom pipeline connections, and installation of water motors and geyser connections.

Finishing Work

Elevate your home with our extensive finishing services, including the installation of floor tiles, marble, or granite; wall tiles for kitchens and bathrooms; and elegant false ceilings (POP / gypsum). We also provide expert paint, polish, and texture work, custom woodwork for doors, wardrobes, and kitchen cabinets.

Exterior Work

Enhance your home's curb appeal with our exterior work, covering front elevation finishing, sturdy boundary wall construction, main gate installation, and car porch flooring. We also offer roof waterproofing and professional landscaping services.

Turnkey Services

Experience hassle-free home building. We manage the entire project, providing all necessary material and labor, comprehensive project management, and ultimately, a complete house handover ready for living.

Need a bespoke solution?

We offer additional services including home extensions, smart home installations, and solar system coordination.
